$description: WIRED — consumed by components/ui/icon (<Icon size=…> → size-(--icon-size-*)). md (1rem) matches the [&_svg]:size-4 baseline every component chrome already uses; xs/sm/lg match the size-3/3.5/5 steps in button variants.

md.$description: DEFAULT — the ubiquitous size-4 chrome baseline.

strokeWidth.$description: ONE stroke width for every icon size (1px). Figma cannot vary this per size: an instance-swap brings the glyph in with its MASTER stroke, so any per-size override dies the moment someone swaps the glyph. Binding the master to a single 1px value is the only way the kit can GUARANTEE the weight. The browser still scales strokes with the viewBox, which is why CSS never reads these.

md.$description: 16px icon → 1px. This is the value BOUND on every glyph master in Figma.

lg.$description: 20px icon → 1px. Was 2px; that override could not survive a glyph swap, so it was dropped in favour of a weight the system can actually enforce.

base.$description: lucide default (stroke-width in a 24 viewBox). Source of truth for icons/custom/ geometry.
